## Product name + URL

## 1-paragraph architectural summary

What does it actually do? Architecture, not marketing copy.

## Why it positions as a company brain

Quote the vendor's own framing where they call themselves a "company brain," "knowledge platform," "AI knowledge layer," "agent memory for the enterprise," etc.

## Public docs

Engineering blog or technical docs URL we can score from.

## Self-rated scoring (optional)

If you work at this company and want to propose initial scores, fill in the four dimensions and link your reasoning. We'll evaluate independently.

| Dimension | Proposed score | Evidence link |
|-----------|----------------|----------------|
| Freshness | | |
| Audience-safety | | |
| Portability | | |
| Operational provenance | | |
